items.title: Google ships Gemini 3.6 Flash and 3.5 Flash-Lite, tuned for agentic workloads
items.note: 17% fewer output tokens and fewer tool calls per task than 3.5 Flash, now $1.50/$7.50 per million tokens

items.title: Big landlords list thousands more homes as ROAD to Housing Act investor cap bites
items.note: Institutional listings have more than doubled since February to 9,447 homes as the law bars 350+-home buyers from purchasing more

items.title: Fidelis closes its fourth fix-and-flip loan securitization this year, $191.5M
items.note: 381 residential transition loans across 24 lenders, rated by Morningstar DBRS and KBRA

items.title: OpenAI opens a business-development operation in Israel with its first local hires
items.note: Ex-AWS-for-Startups Israel lead joins to run outreach; a startup event with AWS is planned this month

items.title: Nvidia's Israeli-built Spectrum-X6 switch heads into the world's largest AI data centers
items.note: Microsoft, xAI, Tesla, CoreWeave and Nebius adopting the networking chip developed at Nvidia's Israel R&D center
